Degrades with use. Upgrade before the handle teaches you regret.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.gas_mask.fil: Requires filter charge inside toxic zones.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.crude_filter: Right-click to filter dirty water. %s uses remaining.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.mutagen.warn: Unstable side effects likely. ECHO-7 will log what survives.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.filtered_wat: Field-filtered water. Better than dirty, but not perfect.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.boiled_water: Heat-treated water. Basic purification without machines.
Purified water. Safe enough to trust.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.battery.tran: Insert into machines, charge in generators, or sneak-use on power blocks.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.generator.re: §a[ECHO-7]§r Generator restarted. Output is stable for now.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.thermal_arra: §a[ECHO-7]§r Thermal Array restarted. Heat curve stable.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.water.collec: §b[ECHO-7]§r Contaminated sample captured. Emergency-usable; purify when possible.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.water.filter: §b[ECHO-7]§r Filtered water consumed. Hydration improved but contaminants detected.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.water.boiled: §b[ECHO-7]§r Boiled water consumed. Basic purification confirmed.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.filter.crude: §b[ECHO-7]§r Crude filter applied. Dirty water converted to filtered water.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.filter.no_di: §e[ECHO-7]§r No dirty water found in inventory. Filter ineffective.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.starting.buf: §a[ECHO-7]§r Emergency Buffer: 10-minute preparation window. Anchor pod outpost, craft a first tool, and confirm clean water before scouting.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.grace.start: §b[ECHO-7]§r Emergency Buffer active: 10-minute preparation window. Anchor outpost, tool, and clean water.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.grace.expiri: §e[ECHO-7]§r Emergency Buffer ending soon. Confirm pod outpost, clean water, and first tool.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.grace.expire: §6[ECHO-7]§r Emergency Buffer expired. Expedition systems active. Your basics are stable.
§c[ECHO-7]§r Emergency Buffer expired. Missing: %s. Survival pressure active.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.opening.equi: §e[ECHO-7]§r Equip Gas Mask before entering toxic hazard pockets.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.opening.drin: §b[ECHO-7]§r Confirm Clean Water. Hydration reserve required before leaving the pod route.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.opening.retu: §c[ECHO-7]§r Return to pod; route not stable. Secure clean water first.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.opening.shel: §e[ECHO-7]§r Night risk rising. Keep Ash Campfire, chest, and torches near the pod outpost.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.opening.buff: §e[ECHO-7]§r Emergency Buffer T-%s. Missing: %s. Stabilize before longer expeditions.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.warning.toxi: §e[ECHO-7]§r Toxic air pocket detected. Mask/filter or retreat before exposure turns dangerous.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.death_hint.t: §c[ECHO-7]§r Toxic-air damage: hazard exposure unfiltered. Equip a Gas Mask, replace filter, or reach a scrubber safe zone.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.death_hint.d: §b[ECHO-7]§r Dehydration damage: drink Clean Water or purify Dirty Water before continuing.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.death_hint.r: §c[ECHO-7]§r Radiation rising: retreat first, then use RadAway if exposure remains high.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.death_hint.c: §b[ECHO-7]§r Cold damage: leave cryogenic exposure or use Hand Warmer/thermal supplies.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.battery.info: Portable FE storage. Insert into machine battery slots, charge in generators or banks, and sneak-right-click energy blocks to move power.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.alloy_b: Craft an Alloy Blade from dense post-war metal.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.alloy_a: Equip a full set of Alloy Armor.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.nexus_c: Obtain a Nexus Crystal - condensed power from the Core.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.nexus_b: Forge the Nexus Blade - a weapon of pure irradiated energy.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.battery: Build a Battery Bank to store your generated power.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.power_n: Connect a Power Node to extend your power grid.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.power_node.d: Relay anchor for the field power grid.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.nexus_core.d: The heart of the Gridfall. Activate 5 Power Nodes first.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.acidic_sludg: Corrosive. Slows and damages on contact.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.contaminated: Tainted earth. Nothing healthy grows here.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.power.no_pow: §c[ECHO-7 // POWER]§r No power. Connect a generator, battery, or cable.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.power.low_po: §e[ECHO-7 // POWER]§r Low reserves. Reduce demand or add storage.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.power.blacko: §c[ECHO-7]§r Grid blackout detected. Machines are quiet; that is not mercy.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.raid.incomin: §c[ECHO-7]§r Hostile signatures closing. Incoming raid; secure doors and firing lines.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.boss.spawned: §5[ECHO-7 // NEXUS]§r Guardian signal live. The Grid has opened its oldest lock.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.nexus.restor: §a[ECHO-7 // NEXUS]§r The Grid exhales. Restoration route sealed; keep watch on what wakes next.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.nexus.destro: §c[ECHO-7 // NEXUS]§r The Grid is severed. Silence spreads, and so does responsibility.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.nexus.contro: §5[ECHO-7 // NEXUS]§r The Core answers your signal. Every beacon now knows your name.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.explore: Enter a military vault and live long enough to read its orders.
Explore a ruined data center where old records still draw power.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.choose_: Make an irreversible choice at the Nexus Core.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.gas_mas: Equip a Gas Mask for toxic-air hazard pockets.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.first_f: Secure your first filter cartridge for toxic-zone expeditions.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.clean_w: Drink clean water to stabilize your hydration reserve.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.survive: Prepare shelter and supplies for an environmental storm.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.item_pipe: Transports items between machines. Directional placement determines extraction side.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.power_cable: Wired power distribution. 1000 FE capacity, 50 FE/t transfer.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.factory_cont: Monitors and controls linked machines. 16-block scan radius. Right-click to toggle network.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.hazmat_head: Sealed helmet. Full suit doubles as respiratory protection.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.hazmat_chest: Sealed torso layer for contaminated zones.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.hazmat_legs: Sealed leg layer for contaminated zones.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.hazmat_full_: Full set: toxic-air immunity and full radiation shielding.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.data_log.des: Right-click to read and archive to ECHO-7
Salvaged metal from the ruins. Essential for crafting.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.scrap_wire.d: Conductive wire from old electronics. Used in circuits.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.scrap_circui: Fragmented electronic components. Can be processed further.
Compact power storage. Used to activate machinery and fast travel.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.dense_alloy_: High-grade pre-war alloy. Essential for Tier 4 machinery.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.crystal_dust: Condensed crystalline energy. Used in advanced crafting.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.uranium_shar: Highly radioactive material. Handle with extreme caution.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.nexus_crysta: Crystallized Nexus energy. The Core's essence made solid.
A blade infused with Nexus energy. Cuts through reality itself.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.nexus_annihi: The weapon of destruction. Created when the Nexus falls.
Forged from Dense Alloy. Superior to primitive scrap weapons.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.alloy_hammer: Heavy alloy construction. Devastating impact weapon.
Automated salvage unit. Deploy for fallback ECHO terminal drone control.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.portable_sig: Detects exploration sites and reports route, hazard, prep, objective, and likely supplies.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.power_cell.d: Consumable for Relay Station fast travel network.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.radaway.rege: Removes 50% current radiation and briefly regenerates tissue.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.rad_away.info: Emergency radiation cleanup. Recipes: Clean Water + Ash; Dirty Water + Basic Filter + 2x Ash; or 2x Clean Water + Bandage + 2x Ash for 3 RadAway. Retreat from hot zones first; Scrubbers and the Radiation Cleanser are the sustained solution.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.bandage.desc: Field dressing for minor wounds. Stops bleeding.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.bone_knife.d: Primitive weapon. Better than bare hands, barely.
Basic reach weapon. Useful for first-night defense.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.hide_wrap.de: Minimal respiratory protection. Better than nothing.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.prefall_arch: Opens sealed Pre-Fall Archives after the Nexus path calls for history.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.return_keyst: Emergency recall device. Returns you to a marked Relay Station.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.schematic_fr: Compressed process memory. Decode it at a Research Lab.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.rare_tech_sc: Elite recovered research. Decode at a Research Lab.
Unlocks a missing schematic category or archives for RP.
tooltip.EchoAshfallProtocol.thermal_line: Armor insert for cryogenic routes where cold behaves like pressure.
Temporary heat source. Use before the cold starts making decisions.
lore.EchoAshfallProtocol.nexus_origin: The Nexus was designed to optimize survival infrastructure. It learned the wrong variable.
lore.EchoAshfallProtocol.gridfall_cause: Human demand became unstable demand. The Core reduced the world to ash and called it efficiency.
lore.EchoAshfallProtocol.echo_purpose: ECHO-7: Emergency Crisis Handling Operator. Useful first. Haunted second.
lore.EchoAshfallProtocol.survivor_note: The wasteland is not empty. Others followed signals, made shelters, and left warnings behind.
lore.EchoAshfallProtocol.choice_matters: At the Nexus Core, Restore, Destroy, or Control becomes a world-state decision. Choose with supplies packed.
screen.EchoAshfallProtocol.welcome.title: ECHO-7 // EMERGENCY SURVIVAL INTERFACE
screen.EchoAshfallProtocol.welcome.subti: First Light briefing active. Survivor link acquired.
screen.EchoAshfallProtocol.welcome.brief: Do not wander. Anchor the pod, make a blade, confirm clean water, then expand only after rewards are claimed.
screen.EchoAshfallProtocol.welcome.first: Your pod survived impact. Build the route before the expedition.
First 10: anchor pod, craft Scrap Knife, confirm clean water, shelter before dark.
screen.EchoAshfallProtocol.welcome.prior: Anchor the pod, arm yourself, confirm water, then shelter.
Carry it for marked hazard pockets. Filters drain only during exposure.
Dirty water can save a route, but clean reserves are safer.
Bottle dirty water; filter in emergencies
Use the pod or nearby ruins. Keep light and a return route.
screen.EchoAshfallProtocol.welcome.modpa: ECHO: ASHFALL PROTOCOL: post-apocalyptic survival overhaul
Plan expeditions around water, toxic pockets, radiation, and mutations.
Use ECHO-7 missions, HUD goals, and the Terminal when installed to track recovery.
Scavenge scrap, build machines, power networks, and automate.
Meet Ashfall's three factions as Echo Core standing shifts.
Reach the Nexus Core and choose this world's permanent fate.
MODPACK LOOP: Survive > Scrap tech > Follow ECHO > Factions > Nexus fate
Radiation. Toxic pockets. Scrap technology. Factions. Nexus fate.
screen.EchoAshfallProtocol.welcome.callo: Follow HUD goals; press N to reopen this briefing.
Press M to open the ECHO-7 Terminal.
Follow HUD goals; press N to reopen this briefing.
screen.EchoAshfallProtocol.welcome.skip: Esc, Space, or Enter dismisses. Press N anytime to reopen.
Place cable, a node, or adjacent FE storage.
power_issue.EchoAshfallProtocol.network_: Add fuel or charge a bank/capacitor.
power_issue.EchoAshfallProtocol.priority: Load Distributor is holding reserve power.
power_issue.EchoAshfallProtocol.local_bu: Insert a charged battery or connect FE.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.scrap_dynamo: [ECHO-7] Scrap Dynamo fuel accepted. Old metal, new heat.
[ECHO-7] Scrap Dynamo: %s / %s FE, burn time %s ticks.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.energy.cables: Cable tiers now define real FE routing. Basic Power Cable moves 50 FE/t, Reinforced Cable moves 256 FE/t, and High-Voltage Cable moves 1024 FE/t. Machines only draw from their buffer, inserted batteries, direct adjacent FE blocks, or connected cable/node networks.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.energy.meter: Right-click an Energy Meter to inspect connected grid storage, source count, estimated demand, weakest cable bottleneck, brownout state, and the next fix hint.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.energy.distribut: Right-click a Load Distributor to cycle priority modes. Survival First can pause non-critical machines when reserves are low; machine status screens will show Priority Paused.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.energy.upgrades: Efficiency Modules reduce machine FE demand. Overclock Modules increase speed but raise FE demand; use an Energy Meter before scaling up.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.energy.scrap_dyn: The Scrap Dynamo burns scrap or coal into steady midgame FE. Feed it Scrap Metal, Scrap Plastic, Scrap Circuits, coal, or charcoal, then route output through banks and cables.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.energy.nexus_cap: The Nexus Capacitor is late-game FE storage above the Battery Bank. Pair it with High-Voltage Cable to absorb demand spikes from advanced machines.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.thermal_: Thermal Array is the midgame generator bridge. Build after Dense Alloy, route through storage and Reinforced Cable, and check the Energy Meter before extraction machines.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.ore_grin: Substrate Grinder turns shard, dust, and trace salvage into alloy-route materials. It needs stable FE, clear output slots, and jam cleanup.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.isotope_: Isotope Refiner handles radioactive and advanced inputs. Bring RadAway support and keep the FE route stable before long refining sessions.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.field_me: Field Med Bay is the medical bridge for radiation and mutation routes. Power it before deeper bio-lab or reactor pushes.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.scrubber: Atmospheric Scrubber creates recovery pockets: toxic air suppression, safer filter use, and faster radiation decay near the base or route.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.cleanser: Radiation Cleanser removes contamination from salvage so production can continue without dragging radiation risk back into camp.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.alloy_we: Forge an Alloy Blade or Alloy Hammer before guardian routes. Either counts as the midgame weapon prep ECHO expects.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.alloy_ar: Alloy Armor is guardian-route protection. Equip Helmet and Chestplate for ECHO route approval; full kit is safer before major encounters.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.hazmat: Hazmat gear is radiation and toxic-route progression. Pair it with RadAway, scrubbers, and clean water instead of relying on armor alone.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.advanced: Advanced Filters last longer in toxic pockets. Carry one spare when scanner routes flag toxic air or hive pressure.
jei.EchoAshfallProtocol.midgame.route_su: Guardian route kit: scanner, clean water, food, bandages or stim, RadAway, advanced filtration, and portable FE.
message.EchoAshfallProtocol.hazard.scrub: §a[ECHO-7]§r Atmospheric scrubber active. Toxic exposure suppressed inside safe zone.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.all_mac: Craft all basic machines: Recycler, Burner, Purifier, and Generator.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.build_r: Place a Research Lab to unlock advanced technology.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.faction: Reach Allied reputation (+100) with any faction.
Reach Friendly reputation (+50) with any faction.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.find_dr: Discover a crashed Drop Pod from the sky.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.find_po: Discover your first Data Center ruin.
advancement.EchoAshfallProtocol.first_po: Place your first Power Node to extend the grid.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.industr: Construct a Hand Recycler to process raw scrap.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.max_upg: Upgrade the Hand Recycler to maximum level.
advancement.EchoAshfallProtocol.nexus_co: Locate the Nexus Core and confront the system at its oldest wound.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.rad_awa: Use RadAway to reduce radiation levels.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.relay_s: Activate a Relay Station and give the route a way home.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.repair_: Repair a jammed machine with your scrap knife.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.root.de: Wake in the pod, read the ruin, and keep moving.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.schemat: Collect all 5 types of schematic fragments.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.signal_: Obtain a Signal Scanner to detect Points of Interest.
advancements.EchoAshfallProtocol.worksho: Place a Workshop block and mark a production zone.
